action.reasoning: Observation: iter_21 eval achieved mean_r2=0.3039 with linear model trained on 5M samples, threshold=0. Analysis: The linear model performs well, and training on more data (full 10M) could further reduce variance and improve generalization. With ~25 min and 9 iters left, fitting Ridge on full dataset via normal equations is fast (<1 min) and likely to yield a slight boost. Decision: Write fit_full_linear.py to compute sufficient statistics on full training data using chunked memmap reads, solve Ridge, and save model. Then submit eval with the refined linear model. Keep predict.py unchanged.
